title: swietenia velutina
intro: Swietenia velutina, also known as the velvet tree or makabuhay, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly due to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Swietenia velutina include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it a valuable remedy for various diseases. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in the Philippines, where it is native.
